key.name: resize-left
key.summary: Resize focused window to the left half of the current workarea
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the left-half preset.

key.name: resize-right
key.summary: Resize focused window to the right half of the current workarea
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the right-half preset.

key.name: resize-full
key.summary: Resize focused window to the full current workarea
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the full-workarea preset.

key.name: resize-center
key.summary: Resize focused window to a centered 1280x720 rectangle
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the centered fixed-size preset.
